meaning: n.[植] 胡芦巴(一年生豆科植物)
examples: Fenugreek is an annual Mediterranean and Asiatic herb with aromatic seeds.
This paper studied the acid hydrolysis conditions of fenugreek neutral polysaccharide.
Fenugreek is a bean-like plant that grows throughout Asia and features widely in Indian cooking.
Georgian cuisine is extravagant and bold, rich with walnuts and fragrant herbs like fenugreek and dried marigold.
One study found that fenugreek seeds may be effective against breast cancer.
